overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit, industrial sci-fi interior. The character ascends stairs, walks through metal corridors, passes through a circular airlock doorway, and enters an engineering bay with machinery and an NPC worker.

agents.ego_description: walking up metal stairs in a narrow industrial corridor

entered.detail: grey metal walls with vertical panels lining the stairwell
exposed industrial piping and conduits running along the ceiling
rectangular white light fixtures mounted on the walls
metal grating stairs with yellow caution markings

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow metal stairwell in a dimly lit industrial interior. Exposed piping runs along the ceiling while wall-mounted lights illuminate the grey metal walls and grated stairs.

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor toward the Engineering section sign

entered.detail: illuminated orange sign reading ENGINEERING with directional arrows
metal storage cabinets and equipment racks along the right wall
large circular airlock doorway at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a straight industrial corridor with metal walls and flooring. An illuminated Engineering sign hangs overhead as the character approaches a large circular airlock doorway at the corridor's end.

events.description: passing through circular airlock doorway into the engineering bay

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular airlock doorway into the engineering room

entered.detail: large red valve wheel mounted on the circular door mechanism
massive industrial machinery visible through the doorway opening

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a large circular airlock doorway marked with a red valve wheel. The doorway frames a view into a larger engineering bay with heavy machinery visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: engineering bay with heavy machinery and workstations

events.description: character slows and stops near the large machinery to observe

agents.ego_description: walking through the engineering room and approaching the large machinery, observing the equipment

notable_agents.action: technician in blue shirt working on machinery controls

entered.detail: green industrial workbench with tools and equipment
retro-style computer monitor and keyboard on a desk
stacked cargo containers and storage boxes in the background

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious engineering bay containing large industrial machinery, workbenches, and computer terminals. A technician in a blue shirt works on equipment to the left. The character approaches and stops near a massive generator-like machine to observe the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dimly lit stairwell into a vast, active industrial engineering bay. It begins with the character ascending a narrow metal stairwell surrounded by exposed piping and grey walls, before transitioning into a straight corridor beneath an illuminated Engineering sign. As the character moves forward, the corridor opens up toward a large circular airlock doorway marked with a red valve wheel. The camera then passes through this threshold, shifting from the confined hallway into a spacious bay filled with heavy machinery, workbenches, and computer terminals. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a technician in a blue shirt working on equipment as the character approaches a massive generator to observe the surroundings.
